Sanford Restaurant Health Grades

61%Grade A
4.3Avg rating
41Restaurants

Sanford leans american — 13 of the 41 restaurants we track — and we grade each on its latest Florida health inspection, not its menu. 61% currently hold an A, on an average diner rating of 4.3 stars.

Sanford restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Sanford restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 41 Sanford restaurants we grade, 25 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Sanford restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Sanford?

We currently publish 41 graded restaurants in Sanford, with an average diner rating of 4.3 stars; 25 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.
